creator: filis@FreeBSD.org
text:
simply changing ESBUILD_VERSION in the Makefile to 0.24.0 doesn't quite help, it then can't run

        ${CP} ${DISTDIR}/${SQLCIPHER}.tar.gz \
                ${WRKSRC}/node_modules/@signalapp/better-sqlite3/deps/sqlcipher.tar.gz

because `${WRKSRC}/node_modules/@signalapp/better-sqlite3/deps` is missing. Creating that directory gets a bit furtcher, but then the 

cd ${WRKSRC} && ${PATCH} -s -N -i ${FILESDIR}/sqlite3.gyp.diff

fails, because the file to patch node_modules/@signalapp/better-sqlite3/deps/sqlite3.gyp is not there, because the directory only contains the sqlcipher.tar.gz from the copy step above.
It seems, something before that doesn't work, probably the npm stuff that gets the better-sqlite3 files
